item.title: 编码的 10 大名人 | Top 10 Celebrities Who Code
item.description:
如果你愿意，请相信我，但这里有十位最著名的名人，他们也有开发者的职业生涯。

  1. 泰勒·斯威夫特（iOS 开发者）
  2. 麦莉赛普拉斯（E2E 测试员）


如果您能想到另一个杰出的开发者名人，请务必发表评论！ 我们能进入前 30 名吗？

托梅克·波尼亚托维茨 - 一旦暂停，perssondennis 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，perssondennis 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，perssondennis 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，并且只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 perssondennis 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Trust me if you want, but here are the ten most famous celebrities who also has a career as developers.

  1. Mr. JavaBean (Java developer)
  2. Brad Git (GitOps expert)
  3. Nathalie Postman (Backend developer)
  4. Matt Daemon (OS programmer)
  5. Kanye Jest (Unit tester)
  6. Taylor Swift (iOS developer)
  7. Json Mraz (Fullstack developer)
  8. Vim Diesel (Unix developer)
  9. Jay-C (C developer)
  10. Miley Cypress (E2E tester)


Kanye Jest ain't testing Swift code

Make sure to leave a comment if you can think of another brilliant developer celebrity! Can we reach a top 30 list maybe?

Mehedi Hasan Sagor - Jun 27

Tomek Poniatowicz - Jul 6

Pinesucceed Pvt Ltd - Jun 23

item.title: 最佳应用商店 | 全时开发 | Best app store | All-time-dev
item.description:
在这篇文章中，我们将找出可以启动您的第一个应用程序的最佳应用程序商店。 我们将仅提及一些流行和最好的应用商店，您可以在其中找到很多用户。 因此，如果您喜欢我们的帖子并想要更多这样的帖子，请与您的开发者朋友分享我们的帖子。

谷歌游戏商店

这是一个非常受欢迎的应用程序商店，您可以在其中找到各种应用程序，包括视频编辑应用程序、照片编辑应用程序等等。 在这家商店中，您还可以找到游戏、电影、书籍等。

这家商店有免费和付费的应用程序，但大多数都是免费的，这也是它如此受欢迎的原因，商店中的所有应用程序都是安卓应用程序，这意味着你只能为安卓设备下载它们。

这个受欢迎的应用商店归 Google 所有。 它于 2008 年 10 月 22 日首次发布，它直接与您的 android 设备上的默认应用程序一起提供，并且非常易于使用。

您也可以通过 Google Play 控制台在 Google Play 商店发布您的应用，但首次存款需要 25 美元，之后您可以发布许多您想要的应用。

而且它非常值得信赖，所有 android 用户都从 Google Play 商店和其他一些我们稍后会讨论的商店下载他们的大部分应用程序。

在这个应用商店里，你只会找到 100% 正版的应用。 他们还有一个广告网络来通过您的应用获利，谷歌称为 Admob，但请确保如果您想使用 Admob 通过您的应用获利，那么您必须在 Google Play 商店上发布您的应用，然后只有 Admob 广告会显示在您的安卓应用。 如果您想了解更多关于其他一些广告网络以获利的信息，那么您可以访问我的这篇文章。

苹果应用商店

这个应用商店也是IOS平台上非常受欢迎的应用商店。 它于 2008 年 7 月 10 日由 Apple 发布，您可以在此应用商店中找到不同类别的不同应用和游戏，如翻译应用、iTunes 和更多类型的 IOS 应用。

您还可以找到免费和付费游戏，但有一点不同的是，此应用商店中的大多数应用程序都是付费应用程序和游戏，而一些在 Google App Store 上免费的游戏也在 Apple App Store 上付费。 您只能在此应用商店中找到应用和游戏。

但是这个应用商店在安全性方面是最好的，因为这个应用商店上的所有应用都是安全的，IOS 移动设备和应用商店很受欢迎，Apple 员工手动筛选每个应用以保持安全。

因此，您必须学习 IOS 应用程序开发，然后才能为 IOS 设备创建应用程序。 但是有一个解决方案，您可以使用 Flutter 和 Dart 为 android 和 IOS 设备创建应用程序。

这也是一个非常受欢迎的应用商店来启动您的应用。 他们有数百万用户，他们也有付费和免费的应用程序，你可以从他们的网站下载

或他们的下载器，包括所有视频编辑应用程序、照片编辑应用程序、Uber Eats、Swiggy 等食品订购应用程序，他们的商店也有 PUBG、Free Fire 等游戏，以及谷歌 Play 商店，他们的大多数应用程序也是自由的。

但是，他们的应用商店不提供电影和书籍，但没关系，因为人们主要只从应用商店下载应用和游戏，而 APKPURE 应用商店中的所有应用都只能下载用于安卓设备。

此 App Store 归 APKPURE TEAM 所有。 这个应用商店最棒的地方在于，您可以使用 APKPURE 开发者控制台免费在该商店发布您的应用。

但是您不能使用 Admob 在 APKPURE App Store 上通过您的应用获利。 您必须使用其他广告网络来通过您的应用获利，例如 Media.net 或 Google Adsense 等。我一定会在最好的广告网络上创建一个帖子，以免费通过您的应用获利。

但总的来说这个应用商店非常好，但这个应用商店唯一的问题是这个应用商店上的应用程序不确定是否安全。

我建议只下载 Google Play Store 上已经提供的游戏，例如 GPAY 或 UPI，它们已经在两个应用商店中提供。

许多应用程序开发人员在此商店推出他们的应用程序，数百万人从这里下载应用程序。

此应用商店仅提供免费游戏。

您可以在 Uptodown 上找到游戏和应用程序。 该应用商店提供适用于不同操作系统的应用。 您只需打开导航并从支持的操作系统中找到一个选项。

支持的操作系统是 MAC、Android 和 IOS 应用程序，Upto Down 支持多种语言，如印地语、中文、日语、意大利语等。

但是这个应用商店的主要问题是你在这个应用商店上找不到一些流行的应用和游戏，就像我在这个商店里搜索过 Minecraft 但我找不到它一样。 但也有一些应用程序和游戏甚至在 Google Play Store 和 Apple App Store 上都没有。

但我喜欢 Uptodown 的一点是，该应用商店中的应用和游戏可以 100% 安全下载。 最好的是，一位受欢迎的印度 YouTuber 也在 UptoDown App Store 上发布了他的游戏。 因此，如果您有安卓应用、IOS 或 Windows 应用，甚至是游戏，那么您可以在 Uptodown App Store 上发布它。

根据所有功能、定价、优缺点，Google Play 商店是最好的应用商店，如果您想了解最佳的获利广告网络，可以访问我的这篇文章。



原文:

In this post, we will find out the best app stores where you can launch your first app. We will mention only some of the popular and best app stores where you can find a lot of users. So, if you will like our post and want more posts like this then share our posts with your developer friends.

Google Play Store

This is a very popular app store in which you can find a variety of apps including video editing apps, photo editing apps, and a lot more. In this store, you can also find games, movies, books and more.

There are both free and paid apps in this store but most of them are free and that's also a reason why it is so popular and all the apps in the store are android apps means you can only download them for android devices.

This popular app store is owned by Google. It was first released on 22 October 2008 and it comes directly with the default apps on your android devices and it is very easy to use.

You can also publish your app at Google Play Store through Google Play Console but they take $25 for the first deposit and after that, you can publish many apps you want.

And it's very trusted and all android users download most of their apps from Google Play Store and some other stores about which we will talk later.

In this app store, you will only find 100% genuine apps. And they also have an ad network to monetize your app which is called Admob by google but make sure that if you want to monetize your app using Admob then you have to publish your app on Google Play Store then only Admob ads will be shown in your android app. If you want to know more about some other ad networks to make monetize then you can visit my this post.

Apple App Store

This app store is also a very popular app store on IOS platforms. It was released on 10 July 2008 by Apple and you can find different apps and games of different categories on this app store like translator apps, iTunes, and more types of IOS apps.

You can also find both free and paid games but there is a twist that most of the apps on this app store are paid apps and games and some games which are free on Google App Store are also paid on the Apple App Store. You can only find apps and games on this app store.

But this app store is the best in terms of security because all the apps on this app store are safe for which the IOS mobile device and App Store are popular and Apple employees manually screen every single app to keep security.

Apple doesn't charge any hosting fees but Apple charges around $99 annually and you cannot use Admob to monetize your app on App Store instead you have to use and the technologies and languages used on IOS app development are different from android app stores.

So, you have to learn IOS app development and after that only you can create apps for IOS devices. But there is a solution that you can use Flutter and Dart to create apps for both android and IOS devices.

APKPURE

This is also a very popular app store to launch your app. They have millions of users and they also have both paid and free apps that you can download from their site

or their downloader including all video editing apps, photo editing apps, food ordering apps like Uber Eats, Swiggy, and more and they also have games on their store like PUBG, Free Fire and more and like Google Play Store most of their apps are also free.

However, they don't provide movies and books on their app store but it is OK because people mainly download apps and games only from app stores and all the apps in the APKPURE App Store can be downloaded for android devices only.

This App Store is owned by APKPURE TEAM. The APKPURE Team was founded in 2014 by APKPURE TEAM and it is also very easy to use. The best thing about this app store is that you can publish your app on this store for free using the APKPURE Developer Console.

But you cannot use Admob to monetize your app on APKPURE App Store. You have to use other ad networks to monetize your apps like Media.net or Google Adsense etc. I will definitely create a post on the best ad networks to monetize your app for free.

But overall this app store is very good but the only issue about this app store is that the apps on this app store are not sure to are safe or not.

I will recommend downloading only those games which are already available on Google Play Store like GPAY or UPI which are already available on both app stores.

Uptodown App Store

Uptodown is a very popular app store. Many app developers launch their apps on this store and millions of people download apps from here.

There are also a variety of apps are there on Uptodown like quiz apps, editing apps, recorders, messaging apps, and more. There are only free games available on this app store.

You can find games and apps on Uptodown. This app store provides apps for different OS. You only have to open the navigation and find an option from the supported OS.

The supported OS are MAC, Android, and IOS apps, and many languages are supported on Upto Down like Hindi, Chinese, Japanese, Italiano, and more.

But the main issue with this app store is that you cannot find some popular apps and games on this app store like I have searched for Minecraft on this store but I cannot find it. But there are also some apps and games that are not even available on Google Play Store and Apple App Store.

But the thing that I liked about Uptodown is that the apps and games on this app store are 100% safe to download. Finestly a popular Indian YouTuber also launches his games on UptoDown App Store. So, if you have an android app, IOS or Windows app, or even a game then you can publish it on The Uptodown App Store.

According to all features, pricing, pros and cons Google Play Store is the best app store and if you want to read about the best ad networks for monetization then you can visit my this post.
item.author: alltimedevlopment

item.title: 您应该（可能）解雇您的 Kafka 开发人员 | You should (probably) fire your Kafka developer
item.description:
当我们提到诸如...

  • 卡夫卡
  • 脉冲星
  • 活动MQ
  • 慰藉
  • 然而，我们行业的肮脏秘密是，99.999999999999% 的时间，一些开发人员实现了消息代理，结果变得不必要的复杂性增加了 1000 倍，这意味着您的项目变得无法交付，而您的雇主最终白白浪费钱。

    跟我说； 我们不需要消息代理！

    我看到同样的事情一遍又一遍地发生。 一些在他的 CV 中有漏洞的开发人员被分配了解决某些问题的任务。 这个问题可以很容易地用一个 MySQL 数据库和几个 CRUD 端点解决，但是由于开发人员试图填补他的简历中的漏洞，他最终使用 37 个微服务来实现它，通过一些“热和很酷的消息代理” ，从宇航员的角度精心策划了这个架构噩梦。 在不需要时使用消息代理，就像建造航天飞机去 SafeWay 购物一样。

    卡夫卡是疯狂的，除非你需要它，而且你几乎从不需要它！

    您的雇主支付您的时间。 您在不需要时浪费时间配置 Pulsar，确保您的雇主实际上是在把他的钱冲进马桶，而您却在处理 100 多个 YAML 文件，每 1,000 行代码，迫使您花费 3 周时间来阅读文档在您正确应用事物之前。 是的，简单地配置 Pulsar 以轻松正确运行需要一个月的时间，即使对于高级开发人员也是如此。

    郑重声明，我并不是要在这里专门选择 Pulsar，它是一项了不起的技术，但是就像所有其他消息代理实现一样，几乎从来没有，永远，永远，永远，永远，永远，永远，曾经需要！

    以上暗示，除非你真的需要消息代理，否则你实际上已经从雇主那里偷走了你的薪水，因为你把时间浪费在做不必要的事情上。 坦率地说，我发现雇主甚至付钱给这样的人是很有趣的……

    你应该为自己感到羞耻，应该有人解雇你！

    作为记录，我会将这篇文章发送给你的经理......;）



原文:

We've all seen the eyes of some of our fellow colleagues enter euphoria and la-la-land as we mention technologies such as ...

  • Kafka
  • Pulsar
  • ActiveMQ
  • Solace
  • Etc ...

However, the dirty secret of our industry is that 99.999999999999% of the times some developer implements a message broker, the result becomes 1,000 times more unnecessary complexity, implying your project becomes undeliverable, and your employer ends up wasting money for nothing.

Say after me; We don't need a message broker!

I have seen the same thing happen over and over again. Some developer with a hole in his CV is given the task of solving some problem. The problem could easily have been solved with a MySQL database and a couple of CRUD endpoints, but because the developer is trying to fill holes in his CV, he ends up implementing it using 37 micro services, with cross process communicating, through some "hot and cool message broker thing", orchestrating this architectural nightmare from an astronaut's perspective. Using a message broker when you don't need it, is like building a space shuttle to go shopping at SafeWay.

Kafka is MADNESS unless you need it, and you almost never need it!

Kafka, Solace, ActiveMQ, and all associated technologies results in added complexity, and unless you absolutely need it, this added complexity is literally like stealing from your employer. Your employer pays you for your time. You wasting time configuring Pulsar when it is not needed, ensures your employer is literally flushing his money down the toilet, while you mess around with 100+ YAML files, each 1,000 lines of code, forcing you to spend 3 weeks simply to read the documentation before you can apply things correctly. And yes, simply configuring Pulsar to run correctly easily takes a month, even for a senior developer.

For the record, I don't mean to pick on Pulsar specifically here, it's an amazing piece of tech, however just like all the other message broker implementations, is is almost never, ever, ever, ever, ever, ever, ever, ever needed!

The above implies that unless you really need a message broker, you have effectively stolen your salary from your employer, by wasting your time doing unnecessary things. Quite frankly, I find it fascinating that employers even pay people such as this ...

You should be ashamed of yourself, and somebody should fire you!

For the record, I will be sending this article to your manager ... ;)
item.author: polterguy

item.title: 循环排序算法 | Circular sorting alorithm
item.description:
普拉尚特·米什拉

发表于循环排序先决条件：数组的元素应该在 1 到数组的长度之间

在Circular Sorting中，元素被放置在它们的自然索引处


示例： if the array is [5,4,2,1,3] => [1,2,3,4,5] 

 class Solution { public List < Integer > findDuplicates ( int [] nums ){ int i = 0 , n = nums . length ; while ( i < n ){ int j = nums [ i ]- 1 ; if ( nums [ i ]!= nums [ j ]){ swap ( nums , i , j ); } else i ++; } } public void swap ( int [] nums , int i , int j ){ int temp = nums [ i ]; nums [ i ] = nums [ j ]; nums [ j ] = temp ; }

用法：

  • 它可用于识别数组中的重复项

  • 它还可以用于查找数组中的缺失元素

罗汉·拉文德拉·卡达姆—— 菲尔·坦特罗马诺—— 一旦暂停，prashantrmishra 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

一旦解除暂停，prashantrmishra 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，prashantrmishra 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 prashantrmishra 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Prashant Mishra

Posted on Jul 10

Circular sorting Pre-requisite : elements of the array should be between 1 to length of the array

In Circular Sorting elements are placed at their natural indexs


Example:if the array is [5,4,2,1,3] => [1,2,3,4,5]

class Solution { public List<Integer> findDuplicates(int[] nums){ int i =0,n = nums.length; while(i<n){ int j = nums[i]-1; if(nums[i]!=nums[j]){ swap(nums,i,j); } else i++; } } public void swap(int[] nums,int i ,int j){ int temp = nums[i]; nums[i] = nums[j]; nums[j] = temp; }

Usage:

  • Its useful in identifying duplicates in the array

  • It can also be used to find missing elements in the array

Rohan Ravindra Kadam - Jun 6

Phil Tenteromano - Jun 24

Once suspended, prashantrmishra will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

item.title: AWS 社区建设者 | AWS Community Builders
item.description:
以下是您应该申请的几个原因

精选技术资源 您将有资格获得 AWS 促销积分 加入私人 Slack 频道，四处闲逛，向云计算领域的佼佼者学习。 获得指导和交流机会

一个包含赃物的惊喜盒子。

申请前
在申请过程中，申请人将有机会选择他们的到期区域。 您将在下面找到每个申请人可以自由选择的现有类别。

容器 存储 开发人员工具 无服务器游戏技术 网络和 CDN 数据 机器学习 移动和 Web 应用程序 安全、识别和合规管理、治理和迁移 IoT 在申请该计划之前，您必须具备上述类别之一的专业知识和还表现出学习和贡献的意愿，并与令人惊叹的建设者社区分享您的知识和经验

在申请 AWS 社区建设者计划之前，这里有一些可以增加您被选中的几率

写博客。
确保您有一个博客并积极地在博客上介绍您的专业领域。 如果您没有办法获得个人网站，您可以使用免费服务，如 medium.com 或 Dev.to 或 hasnode.com 或 GitHub 页面来命名这几个资源。

社交媒体追踪

在社交媒体方面，我强烈建议您拥有一个 Twitter 帐户并利用与您的帖子主题相关的主题标签。 我愿意。 随时在@asksouley LinkedIn 上关注我，Reddit 和 GitHub 也是宣传你的技能组合的好地方

对于那些想加倍努力并擅长制作视频教程的人来说，制作 YouTube 视频也是增加被选中机会的好方法

要了解有关该计划的更多信息，请随时查看下面的链接，它将引导您进入官方亚马逊社区建设者计划页面以及他们的 Dev.to 登录页面。

祝你好运

一旦暂停，aws-builder 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，aws-builders 将能够再次评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，aws-builders 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 aws-builders 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

*What the AWS Community Builders Program and how to get in.
*
The AWS Community Builders Program is an initiative undertaken by Amazon to offer not only technical resources but mentorship and networking opportunities to technical enthusiast interested in getting into cloud computing or looking connect with peers in the cloud computing realm.

Below are few reasons what you should apply

Curated technical resources You will be eligible for AWS promotional credits Get to join a private slack channel, hang around and learn from the bests in the field of cloud computing. Get access to mentorship and networking opportunities

A surprise box containing swags.

Before applying
During the application process, applicants will be given the chance to select their area of expiries. You will find bellow the existing category from which each applicant will be free to choose from.

Containers Storage Developers tools Serverless Game Tech Networking and CDN Data Machine Learning Mobile and Web Apps Security, Identify and Compliance Management, Governance and Migration IoT Before applying to the program, it is important that you have an expertise in one of the categories above mentioned and also show a willingness to learn and contribute to the and share your knowledge and experience with the amazing builder's community

Before applying The AWS Community Builders Program, here are few that can increase your odds of being selected

Blogging.
Make sure that you have a blog and actively blogging about your area of expertise. If you don't have the means to get a personal website, you can use free services like medium.com or Dev.to or hasnode.com or GitHub page to name these few resources.

Social Media Trail

When it comes to social media, I will highly recommend having a twitter account and leverage the hashtags that are related to the topics of your posts. I do. Feel free to follow me at @asksouley LinkedIn and Reddit and GitHub are also good place to spread the word about your skillsets

YouTube
For those who would like to go the extra miles and are good at making video tutorials, making YouTube Videos are also a good way to increase your chance of getting selected

To learn more about the program, feel free to check the link below, it will lead you to the official amazon community builders program page as well as their Dev.to landing page.

https://dev.to/aws-builders

https://aws.amazon.com/developer/community/community-builders/

Good luck

@dominguezdaniel - Jun 29

Once suspended, aws-builders will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, aws-builders will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by aws-builders will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If aws-builders is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.
item.author: asksouley

在您的编辑器中查看 Terraform 的成本估算

在投入生产之前防止代价高昂的基础架构更改。

特征

这有助于一些用例：

  • 比较配置、实例类型、区域等：复制/粘贴代码块，进行更改并比较它们。
  • 快速成本估算：编写代码块并获得成本估算，无需使用 AWS、Google 或 Azure 成本计算器，或阅读冗长/复杂的定价网页。
  • 发现代价高昂的拼写错误：如果您不小心输入了 22 而不是 2 作为实例计数，或者 1000GB 卷大小而不是 100，成本估算将立即获取并通知您。

质量代码

面向开发人员的免费和开源代码片段管理器

质量代码

使用 Electron、Vue 3 和 Ace 编辑器构建。
受 SnippetsLab 和 Quiver 等应用程序的启发

最新版本| 文档| 更改日志

支持

所有这些都是有价值的，并将激发进一步的发展。

特征

组织

每个片段都有片段 - 选项卡，这提供了更高级别的组织。

编辑

片段管理器不仅必须提供片段的组织，而且还必须具有良好的代码编辑器。 这就是为什么在 massCode 的引擎盖下有Ace的原因。 我们还在代码格式化程序中添加了Prettier 。

降价

它允许使用单个 API 测试 Chromium、Firefox 和 WebKit。

文档| 它允许使用单个 API 测试Chromium 、 Firefox和WebKit 。 苹果系统视窗铬 104.0.5112.39 火狐102.0 所有平台上的所有浏览器都支持无头执行。 查看系统要求以了解详细信息。

原文:

Marco Biedermann

Posted on Jul 10

Welcome to my Weekly Digest #27.

This weekly digest contains a lot of interesting and inspiring articles, videos, tweets, podcasts, and designs I consumed during this week.

Interesting articles to read

An Accessibility-First Approach To Chart Visual Design

Using a data visualization case study, we will explore how an accessibility-first approach led us down the path of creating a better visual design for charts.

An Accessibility-First Approach To Chart Visual Design - Smashing Magazine

Conditionally Styling Selected Elements in a Grid Container

Conditionally Styling Selected Elements in a Grid Container | CSS-Tricks

Some great videos I watched this week

Horizontal Directional Drilling

This is Daniel's attempt to code a simulation of Horizontal Directional Drilling, laparoscopic surgery for the earth!

by Daniel Shiffman

JavaScript just got way faster

First look at Bun - a fast new JavaScript runtime like Node.js or Deno. Explore the core features of Bun.js and how they might affect full-stack web developers in the future.

by Fireship

What Is Just

by LevelUpTuts

Useful GitHub repositories

Infracost VSCode Extension

See cost estimates for Terraform right in your editor

Infracost's VSCode extension shows you cost estimates for Terraform right in your editor! Prevent costly infrastructure changes before they get into production.

Features

Infracost's extension shows a snapshot of the total cost of resources right above their Terraform definitions. Infracost's output updates on file save. This helps with a few use-cases:

  • Compare configs, instance types, regions etc: copy/paste a code block, make changes and compare them.
  • Quick cost estimate: write a code block and get a cost estimate without having to use AWS, Google or Azure cost calculators, or read the long/complicated pricing web pages.
  • Catch costly typos: if you accidentally type 22 instead of 2 as the instance count, or 1000GB volume size instead of 100, the cost estimate will immediately pick that up and let you know.

Both resource and module blocks support showing cost estimates. Infracost's VSCode extension even supports showing…

massCode

Next version of massCode. A free and open-source code snippets manager for developers

massCode

Built with Electron, Vue 3 & Ace Editor.
Inspired by applications like SnippetsLab and Quiver

Latest Release | Documentation | Change Log

Extensions VS Code | Raycast | Alfred

Support

massCode need your support, give a star on this repo or donate. All of this is valuable and will inspire further development.

Features

Organization

massCode allows you to organize snippets using multi-level folders as well as tags. Each snippet has fragments - tabs, which gives even greater level of organization.

Editor

A snippet manager must not only provide organization of snippets but also have a good code editor. That's why under the hood of massCode there's Ace. Ace is a high performance code editor which supports syntax highlighting for over 170 languages. We also added a Prettier to code formatter.

Markdown

massCode allows you to write in Markdown and provide support to syntax highlighting, tables, list and…

*Playwright*

Playwright is a framework for Web Testing and Automation. It allows testing Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API.

Documentation | API reference

Playwright is a framework for Web Testing and Automation. It allows testing Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API. Playwright is built to enable cross-browser web automation that is ever-green, capable, reliable and fast.

Linux macOS Windows
Chromium 104.0.5112.39 ✅ ✅ ✅
WebKit 15.4 ✅ ✅ ✅
Firefox 102.0 ✅ ✅ ✅

Headless execution is supported for all the browsers on all platforms. Check out system requirements for details.

Looking for Playwright for Python, .NET, or Java?

Installation

Playwright has its own test runner for end-to-end tests, we call it Playwright Test.

Using init command

The easiest way to get started with Playwright Test is to run the init command.

# Run from your project's root directory
npm init playwright@latest
# Or create a new project
npm init playwright@latest new-project

This will create a configuration file…

dribbble shots

by Arfi Maulana

Track your parcel now!

Tweets

HTML/CSS Tips for <img> 🤳– Use "onerror" to catch and set a fallback "src" ✨– Set a "subtle" background-color so users know something is coming 💀– Use CSS aspect-ratio to avoid layout shifts 🖼️

- Remember your "alt" attribute where necessary 🙏

Bundlephobia has been the "JS bundle size report" tool of choice for years, but bundlejs.com is now _wayyy_ better:- Define exactly what to export from packages- Generates treemap analysis- Configure ESBuild, incl externals and minification

Highly recommended!

Quick CSS tip.🙈If you use `clamp` with `calc` for things like fluid typography, you can drop the `calc`.It's baked in! 💪1️⃣ font-size: clamp(1rem, calc(5vw + 1rem), 5rem);2️⃣ font-size: clamp(1rem, 5vw + 1rem, 5rem);

Video alt: Example showing that you can drop `calc`.

🧐 To avoid seeing errors from extensions in Chrome DevTools, check 'Selected context only'.

Picked Pens

by Ksenia Kondrashova

Checkbox Accent Color Pixel Art

by Shaw

Podcasts worth listening

Syntax – CSS5 Color Functions

In this Hasty Treat, Scott and Wes talk about new CSS color functions, and tips for viewing the different options and ways of presenting color that are coming.

Thank you for reading, talk to you next week, and stay safe! 👋

Chrome extensions for downloading Velo code directly from the web editor to your computer.

Add to Chrome

Download Velo code

This extension use File System Access API.

Posts

item.title: .NET MAUI 综述 - 2022 年 7 月 4 日当周 | Roundup of .NET MAUI - Week of July 4, 2022
item.description:
大卫·奥尔蒂瑙

发表于本周我将介绍我在 GitHub 上找到的项目、有趣的 NuGet 库更新以及 YouTube 上的视频。 这绝不是过去一周与.NET MAUI相关的所有活动，所以如果你发现一些有趣的东西，请分享。

目录：

  • 应用项目
  • 图书馆
  • 视频

项目

与 Maui.Graphics 聊天应用程序

使用 .NET MAUI 图形制作的聊天应用程序 UI 挑战。 整个用户界面使用 .NET MAUI Graphics 呈现。 该应用程序有一个单一的原生视图，它创建了一个画布，我们可以在其中绘制所有内容。

基于Tannaz Sadeghi的设计。

基准

接下来，我们将使用 .NET MAUI（本机控件）创建的同一个应用程序与完全使用 MAUI 图形创建的版本进行比较。

注意：已使用 Poco F2 Pro 获取数据。

启动时间

安卓应用框架分析的 AOT 时间 (ms)
聊天应用聊天应用内存消耗
安卓应用框架分析的 AOT 时间（MB）
聊天应用聊天应用版权和轨道游戏引擎

目标是首先享受构建游戏引擎的旅程，其次提供一个框架，使我们能够在构建“典型”游戏的同时利用跨平台框架的最佳部分。

游戏循环方法

该引擎提供了一种“典型”游戏循环方法，它将处理来自用户 (TBA) 的输入，跨场景和游戏对象调用更新，为场景和游戏对象执行渲染循环，然后等待下一个循环前面已经准备好了。

示例用法

本节旨在解释如何在项目中使用引擎。

注册MauiAppBuilder

第一步是使用UseOrbitEngine在MauiProgram.cs文件中注册游戏引擎……

调用应用程序设计

从 Xamarin.Forms 更新到 .NET MAUI。


毛伊星球

使用 .Net Maui 构建的 Planets 移动应用程序 UI。 实现Dribbble 设计

您现在可以阅读博客系列的第 1 部分。 第 2 部分即将推出。

第 1 部分实施后的结果

毛伊星球1.mp4



这被标记为“超级实验”，所以我不确定它的效果如何，但我认为值得注意的是它都是 C# 并且在 MauiProgram 中显示了很多设置。




胰岛素计算器

一个简单的跨平台护理点临床决策支持系统 (CDSS) 应用程序，用于 ICU 中的胰岛素输注和高血糖管理。 可以使用 .NET 6 SDK 或更高版本在 iOS、Android、Mac OS X 和 Windows 上编译开源 .NET MAUI 应用程序。

输注方案计算器基于更新的“耶鲁大学胰岛素输注方案” https://bit.ly/3IsCsia和美国临床内分泌学家协会 (AACE) 血糖目标。 出版物： https ://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4743315/

仅供医疗专业人员在有执照的医生的监督下使用，不提供任何保证。




它使您能够获取安全令牌以调用受保护的 API。 它使用行业标准 OAuth2 和 OpenID Connect。 该库还支持Azure AD B2C 。

快速链接：

发行说明、路线图和 SLA

发行说明和路线图

支持服务等级协议

由于 MSAL.NET 移至 4.x

  • 在下一个主要版本发布后的十二个月内支持主要版本。
  • 不支持早于 N-1 的次要版本

    次要版本是错误修复或具有非破坏性（附加）API 更改的功能。 它…

会议演示应用程序


打开字典

一个简单的字典实现，允许您编写和分组单词并在游戏中重复它

截图

待办事项列表




蓝色通知

探索 Azure 通知中心 API 的应用。

用于使用 sdk 探索 Azure 通知中心的简单 .Net Maui 应用程序。

功能性

  1. 设备列表
  2. 获取单个设备
  3. 删除设备
  4. 发送 IOS 通知

要发送请求，请使用模型文件夹中声明的对象。

在使用这些方法之前，请在设置选项卡中设置连接。




图书馆

谷歌地图

来自 Xamarin 和 .NET MAUI 的 Prism 库的核心维护者 Dan Siegel。

开箱即用旨在简化为您的目标平台生成功能齐全的 CI 构建的过程。 黑暗助手

尽管名字很吓人（？），但这看起来像是一组很好的 MVVM ......助手包括：

  • 暗视图模型
  • 带注册表同步的 DarkObservableCollection
  • 视频

    此现场活动由上海微软反应堆大中华区 (GCR) 主办，由带中文字幕的英语演讲者和以中文为母语的演讲者组成。

    使用 Sentry 监控 .NET MAUI 的错误

    使用自定义渲染器（Xamarin.Forms 体系结构）。

  • 使用自定义处理程序。
  • 使用内容视图。
  • 使用 TemplatedView（模板化控件）。
  • 使用 GraphicsView（绘制控件）。

    • 暂停后，davidortinau 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

    一旦解除暂停，davitortinau 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦未发布，davitortinau 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 davitortinau 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



    原文:

    David Ortinau

    Posted on Jul 10

    This week I'll cover projects I found on GitHub, interesting NuGet library updates, and videos on YouTube. This is by no means all of the activity from the past week related to .NET MAUI, so if you find something interesting please share.

    Table of Contents:

    • App Projects
    • Libraries
    • Videos

    Projects

    Chat App with Maui.Graphics

    Chat App UI Challenge made with .NET MAUI Graphics. The entire user interface is rendered using .NET MAUI Graphics. The App has a single native view that creates a Canvas where we draw everything.

    (Work in progress)

    Based on this design by Tannaz Sadeghi.

    Benchmarks

    Next, we have a comparison between the same App created with .NET MAUI (native controls) and a version created entirely with MAUI Graphics.

    NOTE: A Poco F2 Pro has been used to obtain the data.

    Startup time

    Android App Framework Profiled AOT Time (ms)
    ChatApp .NET MAUI GA SR1 (Native Views) 716.9
    ChatApp .NET MAUI GA SR1 (Drawn Views) 432.1 (39.8% lower)

    (lower values are better)

    Memory consumption

    Android App Framework Profiled AOT Time(MBs)
    ChatApp .NET MAUI GA SR1 (Native Views) 240.876
    ChatApp .NET MAUI GA SR1 (Drawn Views) 180.890 (25% lower)

    (lower values are better)

    Copyright and

    …

    Orbit Game Engine

    The Orbit engine is a game engine built on top of .NET MAUI Graphics. The objective is to firstly enjoy the journey of building a game engine and secondly providing a framework that allows us to utilise the best parts of a cross-platform framework while building a 'typical' game.

    The game loop approach

    The engine provides a 'typical' game loop approach where it will process input from the user (TBA), call update across the scene and game objects, perform a render cycle for the scene and game objects and then wait until the next loop of the previous is ready.

    Example usage

    This section aims at explaining how to use the engine in your project.

    Registering with the MauiAppBuilder

    The first step is to register the game engine in your MauiProgram.cs file using the UseOrbitEngine…

    Calling App Design

    Updated from Xamarin.Forms to .NET MAUI.


    MauiPlanets

    Planets Mobile App UI built using .Net Maui. Implements the Dribbble design

    You can read Part 1 of the blog series for now. Part 2 is coming soon.

    The Result after Part 1 implementation

    MauiPlanets1.mp4



    JellyFin Client

    This is labeled "super experimental" so I'm not sure how well it works, but I think it's notable that it's all C# and shows a lot of setup in MauiProgram.




    Insulin Calculator

    InsulinIPCalc: Insulin infusion protocol calculator and clinical decision support

    A simple, cross-platform, point of care, clinic decision support system (CDSS) app for Insulin infusion and hyperglycemia management in the ICU. The open-source .NET MAUI app can be compiled on iOS, Android, Mac OS X and Windows using .NET 6 SDK or later.

    The infusion protocol calculator is based on the updated "Yale Insulin Infusion Protocol" https://bit.ly/3IsCsia and American Association of Clinical Endocrinologists (AACE) blood sugar targets. http://pro.aace.com/.

    Publication: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4743315/

    To be used by medical professionals under supervision of licensed physicians only, no warranty is applicable.




    .NET MAUI Authentication from AzureAD Team

    MauiApps is where you'll find the app in this rather large repository.

    The MSAL library for .NET is part of the Microsoft identity platform for developers (formerly named Azure AD) v2.0. It enables you to acquire security tokens to call protected APIs. It uses industry standard OAuth2 and OpenID Connect. The library also supports Azure AD B2C.

    Quick links:

    NuGet package

    Microsoft.Identity.Client

    Microsoft.Identity.Client.Desktop

    Microsoft.Identity.Client.Broker

    Build Status

    Release notes, roadmap and SLA

    Release notes and roadmap

    MSAL.NET roadmap is available from Roadmap in the Wiki pages, along with release notes.

    Support SLA

    MSAL.NET became Generally Available with MSAL.NET 3.0.8. Since MSAL.NET moved to 4.x

    • Major versions are supported for twelve months after the release of the next major version.
    • Minor versions older than N-1 are not supported

      Minor versions are bugfixes or features with non-breaking (additive) API changes. It…

    Conference Demo App


    Open Dictionary

    A simple implementation of dictionary that allows you writing and grouping words and repeating it in games

    Screenshots

    ToDo List




    BlueNotify

    An app that explores the Azure Notification Hub APIs.

    Simple .Net Maui App for Explore the Azure notification hub using sdk.

    Functionality

    1. Device List
    2. Get Single Device
    3. Delete Device
    4. Send IOS Notification

    For send the request use the object declared in models folder.

    Before use the methods set up the connection in the settings tab.




    Libraries

    GoogleMaps

    https://www.nuget.org/packages/Onion.Maui.GoogleMaps/

    https://github.com/themronion/Maui.GoogleMaps/

    AvantiPoint.Nuke.Maui

    From Dan Siegel, core maintainer of the Prism library for Xamarin and .NET MAUI.

    The AvantiPoint Nuke Maui library is an extension library for Nuke Build for developers writing DotNet Maui applications. Out of the box it's meant to simplify the process of generating a fully functional CI build for your target platforms. Two extremely attractive features of Nuke Build are that it removes some of the complexity of CI as many of the various tasks are removed from the CI Platform and become agnostic of where they are run. The other attractive feature of Nuke Build is that it moves your build process out of hard to understand YAML to C# you're already extremely familiar with.

    https://www.nuget.org/packages/AvantiPoint.Nuke.Maui

    DarkHelpers

    Despite the frightening(?) name, this looks like a good set of MVVM ... helpers including:

    • DarkObservableObject
    • DarkViewModel
    • DarkObservableCollection w/ registry sync
    • IDarkNavigationService
    • DarkAsyncCommand, DarkCommand, and DarkEventManager
    • ...and more

    https://www.nuget.org/packages/Divis.DarkHelpers.Maui

    https://github.com/michaldivis/DarkHelpers

    Videos

    .NET MAUI Day Live Event

    Hosted by the Microsoft Reactor in Shanghai for the Greater China Region (GCR), this live event features speakers in English with Chinese captions and Chinese native speakers.

    .NET Community Standups

    Error Monitoring .NET MAUI with Sentry

    XAML Data Binding and MVVM Basics

    What's Next for Blazor and .NET

    Steve Sanderson, an engineer on the ASP.NET, gave this presentation at NDC { Porto }.

    [ES] 5 Ways to create controls in .NET MAUI

    1. Using Custom Renderers (Xamarin.Forms Architecture).
    2. Using Custom Handlers.
    3. Using ContentView.
    4. Using TemplatedView (Templated Controls).
    5. Using GraphicsView (Drawn controls).
